title: Tier 2 — Concurrence, Réactivité et Optimisation

evaluations.description: gestion des échecs partiels en pool

evaluations.setup: var s=creerSubject(); var a=[],b=[]; s.subscribe({next:function(v){a.push(v);},error:function(){},complete:function(){}}); s.subscribe({next:function(v){b.push(v);},error:function(){},complete:function(){}}); s.next(1); s.next(2);

evaluations.description: appels concurrents partagent la même Promise
evaluations.setup: var calls=0; var fn=memoiserAsync(async function(x){ calls++; return x; }); fn(1); fn(1);
var calls=0; var cb=creerCircuitBreaker(async function(){ throw new Error('fail'); }, 2, 10000); cb().catch(function(){}); cb().catch(function(){});
